name: Unapologetic with Aisha Tyler
overview: Unlike a conventional after show confined to the companion series itself, Unapologetic will feature Aisha Tyler leading a topical discussion around the broader, female-centric issues and themes that Dietland explores. Tyler will be talking with celebrity fans, series actors and producers, as well as relevant journalists, writers, comedians and other tastemakers.

trailers.title: Unapologetic with Aisha Tyler Best of Episode 101
